do_not_use_when: The corpus has no manifest yet (use corpus_template.py to build one first)
You're working with a single-file target (this is for collections)
purpose: Schema and integrity checks for `corpus_manifest.jsonl`. Enforces the manifest enum vocabulary (label, ai_status, language_status, use), checks required fields, and warns when ESL-labeled entries land in `use: baseline` for voice-coherence work (the language-status ratchet).
use_when: You're building a labeled corpus for calibration / validation
You received a manifest from elsewhere and want to confirm it parses
You're about to run a calibration sweep and need to gate inputs
